Based on the provided context, Alexander Grant (professionally known as Alex da Kid) produced the song **"Love the Way You Lie"** for Eminem.

The text describes this track as a **midtempo hip hop ballad with a pop refrain**. It features a collaboration with Rihanna, who sings the chorus, and includes instrumentation backed by guitar, piano, and violin. The song describes two lovers in a dangerous love–hate relationship.
